federation.serviceSdl:
extend schema
    @link(url: "https://specs.apollo.dev/federation/v2.5",
          import: ["@key", "@shareable", "@external", "@requiresScopes", "@authenticated"])

"""
SBOM subgraph — owns Software Bill of Materials and dependency tree queries.
All fields require the read:sbom scope. Analyst agents hold this scope.
"""
type Query {
    sbom(repoId: ID!): SBOM @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:sbom"]])
    dependencyTree(repoId: ID!, depth: Int): [Dependency!]! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:sbom"]])
    vulnerableDependencies(cveId: ID!): [Dependency!]! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:sbom"]])
    dependency(id: ID!): Dependency @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:sbom"]])
}

type SBOM @key(fields: "id") {
    id: ID!
    repoId: ID!
    generatedAt: String!
    signedBy: String
    sigstoreBundleUrl: String
    slsaLevel: Int
    componentCount: Int!
    components: [Dependency!]!
}

type Dependency @key(fields: "id") {
    id: ID!
    name: String!
    version: String!
    ecosystem: String!
    transitive: Boolean!
    depth: Int!
    license: String
    parentId: ID
    sha256: String
}

extend schema
    @link(url: "https://specs.apollo.dev/federation/v2.5",
          import: ["@key", "@shareable", "@external", "@requiresScopes", "@authenticated"])

"""
Deployment subgraph — tracks which versions are running in each environment.
Reads require read:deployment. Staging writes require write:staging.
Production rollout requires write:production (human-gated).
"""
type Query {
    deployments(repoId: ID!): [Deployment!]! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:deployment"]])
    deployment(id: ID!): Deployment @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:deployment"]])
    activeVersion(service: String!, environment: String!): String @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:deployment"]])
}

type Mutation {
    stageDeployment(input: StageDeploymentInput!): Deployment! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["write:staging"]])
    rollout(deploymentId: ID!): DeploymentResult! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["write:production"]])
}

type Deployment @key(fields: "id") {
    id: ID!
    repoId: ID!
    environment: String!
    version: String!
    deployedAt: String!
    deployedBy: String!
    affectedServices: [String!]!
    status: String!
    sbomId: ID
    hypothesisId: ID
}

type DeploymentResult {
    deploymentId: ID!
    success: Boolean!
    message: String!
    approvalRequired: Boolean!
}

input StageDeploymentInput {
    repoId: ID!
    version: String!
    hypothesisId: ID
    affectedServices: [String!]!
}

extend schema
    @link(url: "https://specs.apollo.dev/federation/v2.5",
          import: ["@key", "@shareable", "@external", "@requiresScopes", "@authenticated"])

"""
Risk subgraph — owns CVE records, risk scores, blast radius analysis.
All fields require read:risk. Analyst agents hold this scope.
Contributes Dependency.risks + Dependency.riskSummary via federation entity merge.
"""
type Query {
    cve(id: ID!): CVE @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:risk"]])
    cvesBySeverity(minScore: Float!): [CVE!]! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:risk"]])
    riskScore(cveId: ID!, repoId: ID!): RiskScore @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:risk"]])
    blastRadius(cveId: ID!, repoId: ID!): BlastRadius! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:risk"]])
    cvesForDependency(dependencyId: ID!): [CVE!]! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:risk"]])
}

type CVE @key(fields: "id") {
    id: ID!
    cvssScore: Float!
    severity: Severity!
    publishedAt: String!
    description: String!
    affectedPackages: [String!]!
    exploitInWild: Boolean!
    nvdUrl: String
}

type Dependency @key(fields: "id") {
    id: ID!
    risks: [CVE!]! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:risk"]])
    riskSummary: DependencyRiskSummary @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:risk"]])
}

type RiskScore {
    cveId: ID!
    repoId: ID!
    score: Float!
    reasoning: String!
    affectedComponentCount: Int!
    transitiveImpact: Int!
}

type BlastRadius {
    cveId: ID!
    repoId: ID!
    servicesAffected: Int!
    transitiveDepth: Int!
    estimatedUsers: Int!
    criticalPath: [String!]!
}

type DependencyRiskSummary {
    dependencyId: ID!
    maxCvssScore: Float!
    criticalCount: Int!
    highCount: Int!
    totalCount: Int!
}

enum Severity {
    CRITICAL
    HIGH
    MEDIUM
    LOW
    INFORMATIONAL
}

extend schema
    @link(url: "https://specs.apollo.dev/federation/v2.5",
          import: ["@key", "@shareable", "@external", "@requiresScopes", "@authenticated"])

"""
Marketplace subgraph — owns remediation options (upgrade, pin, Chainguard swap, vendor patch)
and integrations with agentic.market for x402 micropayments.
Contributes CVE.remediationOptions + CVE.recommendedRemediation via federation entity merge.
"""
type Query {
    remediationOptions(cveId: ID!): [RemediationOption!]! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:marketplace"]])
    patchProviders(packageName: String!): [PatchProvider!]! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:marketplace"]])
    x402Listings(forCveId: ID!): [X402Listing!]! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:marketplace"]])
    recommendedStrategy(cveId: ID!): RemediationOption @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:marketplace"]])
}

type RemediationOption {
    id: ID!
    cveId: ID!
    strategy: RemediationStrategy!
    targetVersion: String
    targetImage: String
    confidence: Float!
    provider: String!
    costUsd: Float!
    description: String!
    x402Listing: X402Listing
}

type CVE @key(fields: "id") {
    id: ID!
    remediationOptions: [RemediationOption!]! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:marketplace"]])
    recommendedRemediation: RemediationOption @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:marketplace"]])
}

type PatchProvider {
    name: String!
    url: String!
    verified: Boolean!
    sbomSigned: Boolean!
}

type X402Listing {
    id: ID!
    providerUrl: String!
    priceUsd: Float!
    description: String!
    acceptedNetworks: [String!]!
}

enum RemediationStrategy {
    UPGRADE
    PIN
    CHAINGUARD_SWAP
    VENDOR_PATCH
    ROLLBACK
}

engineConfig.graphqlSchema:
schema {
  query: Query
  mutation: Mutation
}

directive @requiresScopes(scopes: [[openfed__Scope!]!]!) on ENUM | FIELD_DEFINITION | INTERFACE | OBJECT | SCALAR

scalar openfed__Scope

"""
Marketplace subgraph — owns remediation options (upgrade, pin, Chainguard swap, vendor patch)
and integrations with agentic.market for x402 micropayments.
Contributes CVE.remediationOptions + CVE.recommendedRemediation via federation entity merge.
"""
type Query {
  sbom(repoId: ID!): SBOM @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:sbom"]])
  dependencyTree(repoId: ID!, depth: Int): [Dependency!]! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:sbom"]])
  vulnerableDependencies(cveId: ID!): [Dependency!]! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:sbom"]])
  dependency(id: ID!): Dependency @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:sbom"]])
  deployments(repoId: ID!): [Deployment!]! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:deployment"]])
  deployment(id: ID!): Deployment @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:deployment"]])
  activeVersion(service: String!, environment: String!): String @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:deployment"]])
  cve(id: ID!): CVE @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:risk"]])
  cvesBySeverity(minScore: Float!): [CVE!]! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:risk"]])
  riskScore(cveId: ID!, repoId: ID!): RiskScore @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:risk"]])
  blastRadius(cveId: ID!, repoId: ID!): BlastRadius! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:risk"]])
  cvesForDependency(dependencyId: ID!): [CVE!]! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:risk"]])
  remediationOptions(cveId: ID!): [RemediationOption!]! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:marketplace"]])
  patchProviders(packageName: String!): [PatchProvider!]! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:marketplace"]])
  x402Listings(forCveId: ID!): [X402Listing!]! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:marketplace"]])
  recommendedStrategy(cveId: ID!): RemediationOption @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:marketplace"]])
}

type SBOM {
  id: ID!
  repoId: ID!
  generatedAt: String!
  signedBy: String
  sigstoreBundleUrl: String
  slsaLevel: Int
  componentCount: Int!
  components: [Dependency!]!
}

type Dependency {
  id: ID!
  name: String!
  version: String!
  ecosystem: String!
  transitive: Boolean!
  depth: Int!
  license: String
  parentId: ID
  sha256: String
  risks: [CVE!]! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:risk"]])
  riskSummary: DependencyRiskSummary @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:risk"]])
}

type Mutation {
  stageDeployment(input: StageDeploymentInput!): Deployment! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["write:staging"]])
  rollout(deploymentId: ID!): DeploymentResult! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["write:production"]])
}

type Deployment {
  id: ID!
  repoId: ID!
  environment: String!
  version: String!
  deployedAt: String!
  deployedBy: String!
  affectedServices: [String!]!
  status: String!
  sbomId: ID
  hypothesisId: ID
}

type DeploymentResult {
  deploymentId: ID!
  success: Boolean!
  message: String!
  approvalRequired: Boolean!
}

input StageDeploymentInput {
  repoId: ID!
  version: String!
  hypothesisId: ID
  affectedServices: [String!]!
}

type CVE {
  id: ID!
  cvssScore: Float!
  severity: Severity!
  publishedAt: String!
  description: String!
  affectedPackages: [String!]!
  exploitInWild: Boolean!
  nvdUrl: String
  remediationOptions: [RemediationOption!]! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:marketplace"]])
  recommendedRemediation: RemediationOption @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:marketplace"]])
}

type RiskScore {
  cveId: ID!
  repoId: ID!
  score: Float!
  reasoning: String!
  affectedComponentCount: Int!
  transitiveImpact: Int!
}

type BlastRadius {
  cveId: ID!
  repoId: ID!
  servicesAffected: Int!
  transitiveDepth: Int!
  estimatedUsers: Int!
  criticalPath: [String!]!
}

type DependencyRiskSummary {
  dependencyId: ID!
  maxCvssScore: Float!
  criticalCount: Int!
  highCount: Int!
  totalCount: Int!
}

enum Severity {
  CRITICAL
  HIGH
  MEDIUM
  LOW
  INFORMATIONAL
}

type RemediationOption {
  id: ID!
  cveId: ID!
  strategy: RemediationStrategy!
  targetVersion: String
  targetImage: String
  confidence: Float!
  provider: String!
  costUsd: Float!
  description: String!
  x402Listing: X402Listing
}

type PatchProvider {
  name: String!
  url: String!
  verified: Boolean!
  sbomSigned: Boolean!
}

type X402Listing {
  id: ID!
  providerUrl: String!
  priceUsd: Float!
  description: String!
  acceptedNetworks: [String!]!
}

enum RemediationStrategy {
  UPGRADE
  PIN
  CHAINGUARD_SWAP
  VENDOR_PATCH
  ROLLBACK
}

All fields require the read:sbom scope. Analyst agents hold this scope.

  dependency(id: ID!): Dependency @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:sbom"]])
  dependencyTree(depth: Int, repoId: ID!): [Dependency!]! @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:sbom"]])
  sbom(repoId: ID!): SBOM @requiresScopes(scopes: [["read:sbom"]])
